## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tested in Chrome and Safari
- [ ] No console warnings or errors introduced
- [ ] Existing features still work (placement, drag, undo/redo, save/load)
- [ ] Mobile viewport checked if UI was changed
